results.task: Open Safari, navigate to wikipedia.org, search for 'Alan Turing', and take a screenshot of the article page
Open Safari and create a new bookmark for apple.com in the Favorites folder
Open Safari preferences and change the default search engine to DuckDuckGo
Open Safari, navigate to news.ycombinator.com, and find the top story title
Open Safari with 3 tabs: apple.com, google.com, and github.com, then close the middle tab
Open Safari and enable the Develop menu in Safari preferences
Open Safari, navigate to example.com, and use Reader Mode to view the page content
Open Safari, navigate to a webpage, and save the page as a PDF to the Desktop
Open Safari and clear all browsing history
Open Safari, navigate to github.com, inspect an element using the Web Inspector
Open Finder and create a new folder called 'BenchmarkTest' on the Desktop
Open Finder and switch to List View in the Documents folder
Open Finder, navigate to the Applications folder, and sort by Date Modified
Open Finder and create a new Smart Folder that searches for all PDF files
Open Finder and use Quick Look to preview a file on the Desktop
